features.name: force statement with enum type cast assignment
features.description: Code should include a force statement assigning an enum-typed signal using explicit type casting
features.snippet:
typedef enum logic [3:0] { IDLE = 4'b0000, CHECK2 = 4'b0011 } state_t;
force dut.next_state = state_t'(4'b1010);

features.name: release statement on signal
features.description: Code should include a release statement on a previously forced signal

features.name: force/release in class-based testbench accessing mailboxes
features.description: Code should include force/release statements used within a class-based testbench that accesses signals via mailbox get methods
